homepage.description.message: CCLHUB E-commerce Operations Platform - AI-driven Operations and E-commerce Toolkit

homepage.hero.subtitle.message: AI Operations + E-commerce Toolkit, Making E-commerce Operations More Efficient

homepage.transition.message: One-stop e-commerce operations solution, from data collection to intelligent analysis, comprehensively improving operational efficiency

homepage.products.toolkit.description.message: Real-time product data retrieval, price monitoring, competitor analysis. Supports mainstream e-commerce platforms like Taobao, JD, and Pinduoduo.

homepage.products.aiOps.description.message: Intelligent analysis powered by large language models, automatically uncovering market trends, user behavior, and sales data to provide precise operational strategies.

homepage.products.aiSupport.description.message: 24/7 AI customer support, quickly answering product usage questions, providing feature guidance and best practices.

homepage.products.aiSupport.cta.message: Click the icon in the bottom right corner to start

homepage.features.instant.description.message: No complex configuration required, ready to use after installation. Complete data integration and start analysis in 5 minutes.

homepage.features.precise.description.message: AI-driven data analysis, deep insights into market trends and user behavior, with accuracy rates exceeding 95%.

homepage.features.secure.description.message: Enterprise-grade encryption technology, local data processing, strictly protecting business privacy and data security.

homepage.features.updates.description.message: Regular feature updates, continuous AI model optimization, always keeping up with e-commerce development trends and technology frontiers.

homepage.hero.newTitle.message: AI Tool Development · China Export · Market Entry

homepage.hero.newSubtitle.message: 24 years of e-commerce experience, independent developer, helping businesses achieve measurable growth with AI and localization

homepage.services.aiTools.desc.message: Custom AI workflows, automation systems and Agents for enterprises, from requirement analysis to delivery, understanding business not just technology

homepage.services.chinaExport.desc.message: Leverage China's supply chain and platform advantages to help foreign enterprises expand markets at low cost

homepage.services.chinaEntry.desc.message: Localization promotion and platform operations, helping foreign enterprises truly land in the Chinese market

homepage.about.achievement1.message: 2024: Delivered 13 AI efficiency tools covering customer service, product selection, advertising, copywriting, saving 70% repetitive work

homepage.about.achievement2.message: 4 months as industrial 1688 operations consultant: 3x sales growth, now #1 in soldering iron tip category

homepage.about.cclhub.message: CCLHUB is my continuously developed product ecosystem, a testament to my capabilities.
